## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss John Redmon's background, Aembit's product, and potential future directions for the company.](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [John joined Aembit after being an early customer, impressed by both the product and team dynamics](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [Aembit's strength lies in secure credential management and access control for applications/services](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [There's an opportunity to better educate potential customers on the importance of non-human identity management](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [John is working on a developer-focused access management system as a potential new product offering](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)

## Topics

### John's Background and Journey to Aembit

  - [20+ years in tech, started as software developer, later headed DevOps](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Joined Aembit in Dec 2022 after 2.5 years as an early customer](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Attracted by product capabilities and collaborative team culture](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

### Aembit's Product Appeal

  - [Solves critical secret injection issues in Kubernetes/Spring Boot environments](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Real-time credential injection based on validated requests](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Multi-factor authentication for applications (AWS account, K8s cluster, namespace, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

### Communication Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Growing awareness of terms like "NHI" and "access management", but understanding still limited](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Need to better explain equivalence between human and non-human identity management](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Target audience includes both high-level decision makers and technical implementers](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)

### John's Role and Day-to-Day at Aembit

  - [Works on cloud team, maintaining portal and hosted infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Focuses on backend development, prefers to be "right behind" customer-facing elements](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)

### Integration and Customer-Specific Challenges

  - [Some unique customer requirements (e.g., private network hosting)](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Early adopters willing to collaborate on feature development](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

### Future Focus and Product Ideas

  - [Explore agentic AI authorization support](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Developing a streamlined developer/employee access management system](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
      - [Assign access policies to devices instead of distributing credentials](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [Potential "door opener" product for smaller companies](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue developing the developer/employee access management system concept](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Explore opportunities in agentic AI authorization](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Consider strategies to better educate potential customers on non-human identity management](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Look into ways to tailor communication for different levels of technical understanding within organizations](https://fathom.video/share/EJ1b2tV1rp1JCSR2kkzUiKELwBGMub8w?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
